mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : insertScoreItemConf 설 명 : 기관 성적 항목 -> 성적 항목 복사 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF( SCR_ITM_ID , SBJCT_ID , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_ITM_EXPLN , MRK_RFLTRT , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT CONCAT('SCIT_', #{crsCreCd},SUBSTR(MRK_ITM_STNG_ID, -2)) , #{crsCreCd} , MRK_ITM_SEQ , MRK_TYCD , MRK_ITMNM , MRK_ITM_EXPLN , MRK_RFLTRT , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM MRK_ITM_STNG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND SBJCT_TYCD = #{crsTypeCd}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.selectOprScoreProf 설 명 : 수업운영 점수 (교수) */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.SCORE01 , A.SCORE02 , A.SCORE03 , A.SCORE04 , A.SCORE05 , A.SCORE06 , A.SCORE07 , A.SCORE08 , A.SCORE09 , A.SCORE10 , A.SCORE11 , A.SCORE12 , A.SCORE13 , A.SCORE14 , A.TOT_SCR , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM EVL_SCR A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.selectOprScoreProfTotal 설 명 : 수업운영 점수합 (교수) */ SELECT A.USER_ID , MAX(A.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCT_ID , MAX(A.CRS_ID) AS CRS_ID , MAX(A.CRS_ID) AS CRS_ID , MAX(A.DVCLAS_NO) AS DVCLAS_NO , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE01, 0)) AS SCORE01 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE02, 0)) AS SCORE02 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE03, 0)) AS SCORE03 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE04, 0)) AS SCORE04 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE05, 0)) AS SCORE05 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE06, 0)) AS SCORE06 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE07, 0)) AS SCORE07 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE08, 0)) AS SCORE08 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE09, 0)) AS SCORE09 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE10, 0)) AS SCORE10 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE11, 0)) AS SCORE11 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE12, 0)) AS SCORE12 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE13, 0)) AS SCORE13 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE14, 0)) AS SCORE14 , SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_SCR, 0)) AS TOT_SCR FROM EVL_SCR A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.selectOprScoreAssist 설 명 : 수업운영 점수 (조교) */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.CRS_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.SCORE01 , A.SCORE02 , A.SCORE03 , A.SCORE04 , A.SCORE05 , A.SCORE06 , A.SCORE07 , A.SCORE08 , A.SCORE09 , A.TOT_SCR , A.DELYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM OP_EVL A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId}

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.selectOprScoreAssistTotal 설 명 : 수업운영 점수합 (조교) */ SELECT A.USER_ID , MAX(A.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCT_ID , MAX(A.CRS_ID) AS CRS_ID , MAX(A.CRS_ID) AS CRS_ID , MAX(A.DVCLAS_NO) AS DVCLAS_NO , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE01, 0)) AS SCORE01 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE02, 0)) AS SCORE02 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE03, 0)) AS SCORE03 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE04, 0)) AS SCORE04 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE05, 0)) AS SCORE05 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE06, 0)) AS SCORE06 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE07, 0)) AS SCORE07 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE08, 0)) AS SCORE08 , SUM(IFNULL(A.SCORE09, 0)) AS SCORE09 , SUM(IFNULL(A.TOT_SCR, 0)) AS TOT_SCR FROM OP_EVL A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL B ON A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} GROUP BY A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.listOprScoreProf 설 명 : 점수산정 > 교수 수업운영점수 목록 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , B.SCORE01 , B.SCORE02 , B.SCORE03 , B.SCORE04 , B.SCORE05 , B.SCORE06 , B.SCORE07 , B.SCORE08 , B.SCORE09 , B.SCORE10 , B.SCORE11 , B.SCORE12 , B.SCORE13 , B.SCORE14 , B.TOT_SCR FROM (
) A LEFT JOIN EVL_SCR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.listOprScoreAssist 설 명 : 점수산정 > 조교 수업운영점수 목록 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , B.SCORE01 , B.SCORE02 , B.SCORE03 , B.SCORE04 , B.SCORE05 , B.SCORE06 , B.SCORE07 , B.SCORE08 , B.SCORE09 , B.TOT_SCR FROM (
) A LEFT JOIN EVL_SCR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.listProfScoreItemConf 설 명 : 교수/조교 수업운영 점수산정 > 교수 평가기준 활용 수 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_STD_SCORE_ITEM_CONF WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND MRK_RFLTRT > 0 ) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.listOperAtclCount 설 명 : 교수/조교 수업운영 점수산정 > 알림터 게시글 등록 수 목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM (
) A JOIN TB_HOME_BBS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.RLTN_REF_CD AND B.CONTS_TYCD = 'COURSE' JOIN TB_LMS_BBS C ON B.BBS_ID = C.BBS_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.SYS_BSC_PVSNYN = 'Y' AND C.BBS_ID = #{bbsCd} JOIN TB_LMS_BBS_ATCL D -- 주차 기간에 쓴 글 ON B.BBS_ID = D.BBS_ID AND D.DELYN = 'N' AND D.UP_ATCL_ID IS NULL AND D.LOCKYN = 'N' AND D.FRST_INQ_DTTM BETWEEN A.LCTR_SYMD AND A.LCTR_EYMD AND D.RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID, A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID

/* SQL ID : ScoreDAO.listOperMessageCount 설 명 : 교수/조교 수업운영 점수산정 > 수업운영 메세지발송 수 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , COUNT(1) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM (
) A JOIN TB_LMS_LOG_MSG B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND A.USER_ID = B.RGTR_ID AND B.SND_STSCD = 'S' AND B.MSG_GBNCD = #{msgDivCd} AND B.FRST_INQ_DTTM BETWEEN A.LCTR_SYMD AND A.LCTR_EYMD GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID, A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID
